sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id INTEGER, vector1 ARRAY<FLOAT>, vector2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
INSERT INTO test_vectors VALUES (1, array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT), array_value(2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT, 4.0::FLOAT));
INSERT INTO test_vectors VALUES (2, array_value(4.0::FLOAT, 5.0::FLOAT, 6.0::FLOAT), array_value(2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT, 4.0::FLOAT));
UPDATE test_vectors SET vector1 = array_value(0.0::FLOAT, 1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_cosine_distance(vector1, vector2) AS cosine_distance FROM test_vectors;
